name: [Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator should work with risks from alerts
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator should work with accept risks
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator should install prometheus rules correctly
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator should create agentic runs
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator-tests should support passing tests
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator-tests should support passing serial tests [Serial]
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator-tests can use oc to get the version information
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator should have a network policy
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator should have correct runlevel and scc
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should run all checks without errors
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should produce valid JSON that round-trips
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should report node count matching the actual cluster
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should report operator count matching actual ClusterOperators
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should report etcd member count matching actual etcd pods
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should report network type matching actual Network config
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should report PDB count matching actual PodDisruptionBudgets
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should report cluster conditions matching ClusterVersion status
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator readiness checks should complete all checks within 60 seconds
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator must get the APIServer when the TLS profile manager is created
[Jira:"Cluster Version Operator"] cluster-version-operator should update TLS profile
